endpoints.name: POST /userprofiles/{profileId}/billingProfiles/{billingProfileId}/billingAssignments
endpoints.description: Inserts a new billing assignment and returns the new assignment. Only one of advertiser_id or campaign_id is support per request. If the new assignment has no effect (assigning a campaign to the parent advertiser billing profile or assigning an advertiser to the account billing profile), no assignment will be returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BILLINGPROFILEID}} with a real billingprofileid. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid.

endpoints.description: Inserts a new dynamic targeting key. Keys must be created at the advertiser level before being assigned to the advertiser's ads, creatives, or placements. There is a maximum of 1000 keys per advertiser, out of which a maximum of 20 keys can be assigned per ad, creative, or placement.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid.

endpoints.name: GET /userprofiles/{profileId}/targetableRemarketingLists/{id}
endpoints.description: Gets one remarketing list by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid.

endpoints.name: GET /userprofiles/{profileId}/targetingTemplates
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of targeting templates, optionally filtered. This method supports paging.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid.

endpoints.name: POST /userprofiles/{profileId}/targetingTemplates
endpoints.description: Inserts a new targeting template.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid.

endpoints.name: PUT /userprofiles/{profileId}/targetingTemplates
endpoints.description: Updates an existing targeting template.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /userprofiles/{profileId}/targetingTemplates
endpoints.description: Updates an existing targeting template. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid.

endpoints.name: GET /userprofiles/{profileId}/targetingTemplates/{id}
endpoints.description: Gets one targeting template by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{PROFILEID}} with a real profileid.
